get.description: Returns list of user's deck templates from BFH game server
Returns hero details from BFH game server

post.description: Returns list of heroes from BFH game server. If hero_ids is empty or omitted, returns all heroes

parameters.description: Hero IDs to retrieve (optional, empty means all)
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns current user details from BFH game server including UID, name, wallet address, land status, guild information, and game statistics

401.description: Unauthorized - MCH Auth token not found or expired

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to retrieve user data from game server

Returns the authenticated user's units from AMS (Asset Management Service)

Returns sphere details from BFH game server (internally uses extension)
